title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Launder Your Bottom Line with Money Fronts Bonuses
content:
Give tourists and locals a bird’s-eye view of the Southern San Andreas scenery while taking your money laundering business to new heights with the Higgins Helitours front — available for Hands On Car Wash owners to claim for free at Maze Bank Foreclosures through June 3.

Use your business fronts to conceal behind-the-scenes criminal activity: All Money Laundering Missions at the Hands On Car Wash, Higgins Helitours, and Smoke on the Water dispensary are paying out 4X GTA$ and RP.
